src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: user logs in successfully module: authentication source files or pages: 2 covered methods: preconditions: user has registered an account. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user initiates login request to the application. 2. application forwards the request to the user management system. 3. user management system checks if the user is logged in. 4. user management system requests firebase authentication api to get the current user. 5. firebase authentication api returns the current user. 6. user management system confirms the user is logged in and forwards the user object to the application. 7. application displays the user's profile. expected result: user is successfully logged in and redirected to their profile. unit: project:
